Kumbha for North and lastly Mina for North-East.
Castes of the Signs Karkataka, Vrscika and Mina are
Brahmins, Mesa, Simha and Dhanus Ksatriyas, Mithuna,
Tula and Kumbha Vaisyas, and Vrsabha, Kanya and Makara
£>udras.
The first eight Signs of the Zodiac are termed Material Signs
and the last four Philosophical ones.
Colours of Signs :—The colours of the twelve signs are in
order (1) Red, (2) White, (3) Green, (4) Pink, (5) Brown,
(6) Grey, (7) Variegated. (8) Black, (9) Golden, (10) Yellow.
(11) Variegated, and (12) Deep Brown.
Their Stature Aquarius, Pisces. Aries and Taurus are short;

10 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
Gemini, Cancer, Sagittarius and Capricorn are of medium
length; and Leo, Virgo, Libra and Scorpio, long.
Kalapunifa 's Limbs :—-The whole zodiac consisting of the
twelve signs represents the Body of the Supreme termed Kiia
or Time. The twelve signs, therefore, stand for the head, face,
